name: cowork-ai-os
description: Turn Claude Cowork into your AI business operating system. Onboarding, daily brief with optional team comms + tasks, plan-then-approve file organization (/tidy-downloads — never deletes), voice writer, audit, weekly self-improvement loop. v0.10 added discovery (/browse-skills and /browse-connectors with /level-up branching). v0.10.2 adds live-fetch from Anthropic's public Connectors directory (claude.com/connectors) and Plugin/Skill marketplaces (anthropics/claude-plugins-official + anthropics/skills) so recommendations stay current — no more stale bundled catalogs. /tune-up now surfaces what's new in the directories since your last tune-up.
